conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales Trainer

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Sales Trainer role is designed for a seasoned sales training professional with a strong background in gamification, training, and sales expertise. The ideal candidate will possess excellent communication skills and the ability to design and implement comprehensive training programs to drive pitch retention and product knowledge among sales teams.

## Key Responsibilities
• Design and deliver comprehensive training programs for sales teams, including gamified content pitches and product knowledge training.
• Evaluate employee training needs and develop strategies to ensure pitch retention and product knowledge.
• Collaborate with marketing and product development teams to stay updated on new product features and marketing strategies.
• Develop and implement training programs for new hires and other customer-facing teams.
• Train multiple times and devise strategies to ensure pitch retention, evaluating employees to ensure they are well-trained.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Gamification: ability to design engaging, interactive training experiences.
• Training: skill in creating and delivering effective training programs.
• Sales Expertise: in-depth understanding of sales principles, practices, and methodologies.
• Communication: excellent verbal and written communication skills.
• Collaboration: ability to work closely with cross-functional teams.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Adult Learning Principles: understanding of adult learning principles and instructional design.
• Facilitation Techniques: skill in facilitation techniques to deliver engaging and interactive training experiences.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will have a collaborative mindset, ability to work closely with cross-functional teams, and a results-driven approach. They will possess excellent communication skills, a strong background in gamification, training, and sales expertise, and the ability to design and implement comprehensive training programs to drive business results.

conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales Enablement and Training Specialist

## About Us
At WOGOM, we're building a connected ecosystem to help Indian retailers scale with confidence. Our mission is to empower them through technology, pricing, credit, and growth opportunities.

## Role Overview
We're seeking an experienced Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to design and deliver training programs that enable our sales team to effectively pitch our products to retailers and distributors. You will be responsible for creating a singular understanding of our organization across all employees and ensuring our sales team is equipped with the skills and knowledge needed to drive business growth.

## Key Responsibilities
* Develop and implement comprehensive training programs for our sales team, focusing on sales pitch, product knowledge, and communication skills
* Create engaging and interactive content, including gamified learning experiences, to enhance employee understanding and retention of our products and their value proposition
* Collaborate with subject matter experts and stakeholders to ensure training programs are aligned with business objectives and goals, and that our sales team is equipped to effectively address the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Deliver weekly training sessions, providing feedback and coaching to sales team members to improve their performance and ability to effectively pitch our products
* Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of training programs, using metrics such as training program ROI and effectiveness to drive continuous improvement

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
* Mid-level experience in sales training, enablement, or a related field
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to connect with employees at all levels and understand the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Proven track record of designing and delivering effective training programs that drive business results in a fast-paced and dynamic environment
* Strong content creation and gamification skills, with the ability to make complex concepts engaging and accessible to our sales team and retailer/distributor customers
* Quick grasping power, with the ability to adapt to changing business needs and priorities

### Nice-to-Have Skills
* Adult Learning Principles: understanding of adult learning principles and instructional design
* Facilitation Techniques: skill in facilitation techniques to deliver engaging and interactive training experiences

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will have a collaborative mindset, ability to work closely with cross-functional teams, and a results-driven approach. They will possess excellent communication skills, a strong background in sales training and enablement, and the ability to design and implement comprehensive training programs to drive business results.

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a growth-driven organization that's making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors
* A collaborative and dynamic work environment that values ecosystem thinking and retailer-first principles
* Access to marketing materials, product information, and subject matter experts to support your training programs
* A chance to develop and grow your skills, with opportunities for professional development and career advancement

## How to Apply
If you're passionate about sales training, enablement, and making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors, we'd love to hear from you. Please submit your application, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications for the role.

# Sales Enablement and Training Specialist
## Location: Ahmedabad
## Type: Full-time

## About Us
At WOGOM, we're building a connected ecosystem to help Indian retailers scale with confidence. Our mission is to empower them through technology, pricing, credit, and growth opportunities. We're looking for a talented Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to join our Marketing team and help us achieve this goal.

## Job Summary
We're seeking an experienced Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to design and deliver training programs that enable our sales team to effectively pitch our products to retailers and distributors. You will be responsible for creating a singular understanding of our organization across all employees and ensuring our sales team is equipped with the skills and knowledge needed to drive business growth.

## Key Responsibilities
* Develop and implement comprehensive training programs for our sales team, focusing on sales pitch, product knowledge, and communication skills
* Create engaging and interactive content, including gamified learning experiences, to enhance employee understanding and retention of our products and their value proposition
* Collaborate with subject matter experts and stakeholders to ensure training programs are aligned with business objectives and goals, and that our sales team is equipped to effectively address the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Deliver weekly training sessions, providing feedback and coaching to sales team members to improve their performance and ability to effectively pitch our products
* Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of training programs, using metrics such as training program ROI and effectiveness to drive continuous improvement

## Requirements
* Mid-level experience in sales training, enablement, or a related field
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to connect with employees at all levels and understand the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Proven track record of designing and delivering effective training programs that drive business results in a fast-paced and dynamic environment
* Strong content creation and gamification skills, with the ability to make complex concepts engaging and accessible to our sales team and retailer/distributor customers
* Quick grasping power, with the ability to adapt to changing business needs and priorities

## What We Offer
* The opportunity to work with a growth-driven organization that's making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors
* A collaborative and dynamic work environment that values ecosystem thinking and retailer-first principles
* Access to marketing materials, product information, and subject matter experts to support your training programs
* A chance to develop and grow your skills, with opportunities for professional development and career advancement

## How to Apply
If you're passionate about sales training, enablement, and making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors, we'd love to hear from you. Please submit your application, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications for the role.

# Sales Enablement and Training Specialist
## Location: Ahmedabad
## Type: Full-time

## About Us
At WOGOM, we're building a connected ecosystem to help Indian retailers scale with confidence. Our mission is to empower them through technology, pricing, credit, and growth opportunities. We're looking for a talented Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to join our Marketing team and help us achieve this goal.

## Job Summary
We're seeking an experienced Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to design and deliver training programs that enable our sales team to effectively pitch our products to retailers and distributors. You will be responsible for creating a singular understanding of our organization across all employees and ensuring our sales team is equipped with the skills and knowledge needed to drive business growth.

## Key Responsibilities
* Develop and implement comprehensive training programs for our sales team, focusing on sales pitch, product knowledge, and communication skills
* Create engaging and interactive content, including gamified learning experiences, to enhance employee understanding and retention of our products and their value proposition
* Collaborate with subject matter experts and stakeholders to ensure training programs are aligned with business objectives and goals, and that our sales team is equipped to effectively address the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Deliver weekly training sessions, providing feedback and coaching to sales team members to improve their performance and ability to effectively pitch our products
* Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of training programs, using metrics such as training program ROI and effectiveness to drive continuous improvement
* Stay up-to-date with industry trends and best practices in sales training and enablement, applying this knowledge to continuously improve our training programs and sales team performance

## Requirements
* Mid-level experience in sales training, enablement, or a related field
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to connect with employees at all levels and understand the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
* Proven track record of designing and delivering effective training programs that drive business results in a fast-paced and dynamic environment
* Strong content creation and gamification skills, with the ability to make complex concepts engaging and accessible to our sales team and retailer/distributor customers
* Quick grasping power, with the ability to adapt to changing business needs and priorities
* Ability to work in a collaborative and dynamic environment, with a strong focus on ecosystem thinking and retailer-first principles

## Detailed Information
As a Sales Enablement and Training Specialist at WOGOM, you will have access to a wide range of resources, including marketing materials, product information, and subject matter experts. You will be responsible for leveraging these resources to develop and deliver training programs that drive business growth and support the success of our sales team. If you're passionate about sales training, enablement, and making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity.

# Sales Enablement and Training Specialist

## About Us
At WOGOM, we're building a connected ecosystem to help Indian retailers scale with confidence. Our mission is to empower them through technology, pricing, credit, and growth opportunities.

## Role Overview
We're seeking an experienced Sales Enablement and Training Specialist to design and deliver training programs that enable our sales team to effectively pitch our products to retailers and distributors. You will be responsible for creating a singular understanding of our organization across all employees and ensuring our sales team is equipped with the skills and knowledge needed to drive business growth.

## Key Responsibilities
• Develop and implement comprehensive training programs for our sales team, focusing on sales pitch, product knowledge, and communication skills
• Create engaging and interactive content, including gamified learning experiences, to enhance employee understanding and retention of our products and their value proposition
• Collaborate with subject matter experts and stakeholders to ensure training programs are aligned with business objectives and goals, and that our sales team is equipped to effectively address the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
• Deliver weekly training sessions, providing feedback and coaching to sales team members to improve their performance and ability to effectively pitch our products
• Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of training programs, using metrics such as training program ROI and effectiveness to drive continuous improvement

## Requirements

### Must-Have Skills
• Mid-level experience in sales training, enablement, or a related field
• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to connect with employees at all levels and understand the needs of our retailer and distributor customers
• Proven track record of designing and delivering effective training programs that drive business results in a fast-paced and dynamic environment
• Strong content creation and gamification skills, with the ability to make complex concepts engaging and accessible to our sales team and retailer/distributor customers
• Quick grasping power, with the ability to adapt to changing business needs and priorities

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Communication: excellent verbal and written communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams and deliver training programs

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate for this role will have a collaborative mindset, ability to work closely with cross-functional teams, and a results-driven approach, focusing on achieving specific outcomes such as improving pitch retention and product knowledge. They will be able to drive employee engagement and knowledge retention, and will have a strong understanding of sales principles, practices, and methodologies. With a focus on collaboration, results, and employee development, the Sales Enablement and Training Specialist will be a key contributor to WOGOM's mission to empower Indian retailers and sellers.

Note: Location - Ahmedabad, Type - Full-time. 

What We Offer: 
* The opportunity to work with a growth-driven organization that's making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors
* A collaborative and dynamic work environment that values ecosystem thinking and retailer-first principles
* Access to marketing materials, product information, and subject matter experts to support your training programs
* A chance to develop and grow your skills, with opportunities for professional development and career advancement 

How to Apply: 
If you're passionate about sales training, enablement, and making a real impact in the lives of Indian retailers and distributors, we'd love to hear from you. Please submit your application, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications for the role.
